payload.compiled_summary: Hermes: review Probe Hermes through artifact://environment-spec/eng_hermes_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for Hermes. Checklist Hermes pack links to the intended environment spec(s), Hermes adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, Hermes anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path. Watch anti-patterns Using Hermes for using hermes as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside structures and pde workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_hermes_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for Hermes without a typed contract tied to hermes api-driven workflows for structures and pde workflows.. Healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_hermes_docker. Runtime eng-hermes/docker_image at birtha/knowledge-eng-hermes:1.0.0; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_hermes_docker; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_hermes_docker; verification refs artifact://verification-report/0840c167-114a-59da-84ce-c69726757705. Runtime gate: Bootstrap failed for artifact://environment-spec/eng_hermes_docker: #0 building with "desktop-linux" instance using docker driver.
